series_metadata.series_description: Printed or recorded copies of public speeches given by representatives of state agencies

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until no longer of administrative value, then scan to electronic form for permanent retention. Then review by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Electronic: Original-form Machine-Readable, review by State Archives and copy for them as needed. Machine copy of paper or machine readable original are to be retained permanently, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Permanent
